description: Slip into laidback comfort with these timberland shoes. Coming from Timeberland, these shoes feature upper crafted from leather with stitch detailing for extra style. UpperTwo tone leather upper with mesh inserts on the side for added strength, durability and breathabilityPadded tongue and collar to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blisteringElasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feetMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelMulti-directional lugs on the forefoot and grooves on the heelshoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
